overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring an arid desert landscape. The character walks around a small beige outpost building, passes a tall cypress tree, and continues through open terrain toward distant mountains and power lines before stopping on a dirt road to look around.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert outpost with small utility building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily around the small building, examining the structure from different angles

entered.detail: single-story rectangular prefab building with brown roof and multiple windows
tall metal framework tower with ladder rungs extending upward
tall narrow evergreen tree standing alone in the desert
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through arid desert terrain toward a small beige outpost building. A tall metal ladder tower stands nearby, and a solitary cypress tree is visible in the distance against a backdrop of mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with isolated tree

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the tall cypress tree in the open desert

entered.detail: large metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cross-arms

segments.scene_description: Having left the building behind, the character walks across open desert toward a tall cypress tree. A large power line tower becomes visible in the distance ahead as the character passes the tree on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive desert scrubland with power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open desert toward distant power lines and mountains

entered.detail: worn dirt track cutting through the desert terrain
scattered deciduous trees and shrubs on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through vast open desert, passing the power line tower on the left. A dirt road becomes visible on the right side as the character approaches, with scattered trees lining the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert road intersection with distant structures

events.description: character stops walking forward and turns around to survey the surrounding desert landscape

agents.ego_description: reaching the dirt road, stopping, and turning to look back at the path traveled

entered.detail: distant small structure visible on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the dirt road and stops, then turns to look around. The power line tower is now behind, and the sparse trees on the right are closer. The character surveys the open desert landscape from the road intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an arid desert landscape that transitions from a small outpost toward a vast, open road intersection. It begins with the character walking across the dry terrain toward a beige outpost building and a metal ladder tower, with a solitary cypress tree and distant mountains framing the horizon. As the character leaves the building behind, the camera tracks forward past the cypress tree on the left, revealing a large power line tower emerging in the distance. The scene then expands across the open desert as the character passes the power line tower, with a dirt road gradually appearing on the right side. Finally, the movement concludes as the character reaches the road and stops to survey the sparse trees and wide landscape, leaving the tower behind.
